bodyText:
HEADING1:GST Advance Ruling Application | Virtual Auditor

What is GST Advance Ruling Application | Virtual Auditor | Virtual Auditor?

GST advance ruling application under Section 97/98 CGST Act. Classification, rate determination, ITC eligibility. Pre-transaction clarity.

HEADING2:Offices

Our GST advance ruling practice assists taxpayers in obtaining binding rulings from the Authority for Advance Ruling (AAR) on classification, rate applicability, input tax credit eligibility, and liability questions. Services include: eligibility assessment, question framing strategy, application preparation (Form GST ARA-01), supporting documentation compilation, representation before AAR hearings, and appeal before Appellate AAR if required. Advance rulings are binding on the applicant and the jurisdictional officer. Typical timeline is 90 days from application. Filing fee is Rs. 5,000 per question.
Why Choose Virtual Auditor?

Virtual Auditor brings a unique combination of professional credentials (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI Registered Valuer) and technology-driven service delivery. Our digital-first approach enables efficient engagement management with real-time status tracking for clients. We maintain strict confidentiality through secure document handling protocols and encrypted communication channels. Our team provides responsive support with dedicated relationship managers for each engagement. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, and a pan-India service capability through our digital infrastructure, we serve clients ranging from startups to listed corporations. Contact us for a free initial consultation to discuss your specific requirements and receive a customized service proposal.
